title: draba verna var. majuscula
intro: Draba verna var. majuscula, also known as large whitlow grass or large draba, is a variety of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its large yellow flowers and hairy leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Draba verna var. majuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a salve or tincture, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
